---
title: "Teaching"
---

# Teaching

I am interested in teaching statistics, probability, data science, and statistical computing.

## Teaching Interests

- Introductory Statistics
- Probability
- Mathematical Statistics
- Regression Analysis
- Time Series Analysis
- Bayesian Statistics
- Statistical Computing with R and Python
- Data Science and Machine Learning

## Teaching Experience

Add your teaching assistant, grader, lab instructor, guest lecture, or mentoring experience here.

## Teaching Philosophy

My teaching goal is to help students understand statistical thinking, not only formulas. I aim to connect mathematical concepts with real data examples, computational practice, and clear interpretation.
